content: Hi, I'm looking for some new books to read. I've been so busy with work lately.
What kind of books are you in the mood for?

I'm not sure, I've been listening to a lot of podcasts lately and I think I'd like something that combines my love of tech with a good story. I've been working on a startup and it's been taking up a lot of my time.
That sounds like a great combination! There are some excellent books about tech and entrepreneurship out there. Have you considered 'The Lean Startup' by Eric Ries?

No, I haven't. I'll have to check it out. I've been meaning to get back into reading more, but it's hard to find the time. I've been taking care of my aging parents and working full-time in Lisbon, Portugal.
Wow, you must be very dedicated. Do you have a favorite book or author that you always come back to?
Yeah, I love Neil Gaiman. I've read all of his books and I'm always excited to see what he comes out with next. I've even got a signed copy of 'American Gods' that I treasure.
That's amazing! A signed copy of 'American Gods' must be very valuable. Have you ever thought about writing your own book?
Ha! I don't think so, I don't think I'm a good enough writer. But I do love woodworking and I've even made a few pieces of furniture for my home.
That sounds like a great hobby! Woodworking can be very rewarding. Do you have a favorite type of wood that you like to work with?
Yeah, I love working with oak. There's something about the grain of it that just works for me. I've even won a few local competitions with my woodworking projects.
That's impressive! You must be very talented. Have you ever thought about sharing your projects with others?

Actually, I've been thinking about starting a blog to share my projects and woodworking tips. I've even registered the domain name 'finleywoodworks.com' and I'm planning to launch it on September 1st.
That's a great idea! A blog can be a wonderful way to share your passion with others. Do you have any plans for how you'll promote your blog?
Yeah, I've been thinking about using social media to promote my blog. I've already got a pretty big following on Instagram and I think I can use that to drive traffic to my blog.
That's a great idea! Social media can be very effective for promoting a blog. I see you're based in Lisbon, Portugal, how do you like living there?
I love it! The weather is great and there are always plenty of things to do. I've even joined a local 3D printing club and I'm planning to attend a conference on November 10th.
Wow, that's amazing! 3D printing is a great technology. You must be very interested in tech to be involved in that.
